highlights: **Pipeline Editor is now multiplayer.** Real-time presence, block-level editing locks, and autosave collision prevention dramatically improve collaboration and data integrity when working with teammates.
**Home dashboard surfaces release notes.** Users now see a well-structured "What's new" panel with the latest Mage Pro product updates matching their installed version.
**Release notes only include user-facing features.** Internal engineering and maintenance work are excluded from public change logs, keeping release communications product-focused.
**New cloud QA/dev workflows are EKS-only.** All visual QA, browser proof, and agent work now use AWS EKS agent dev slots as the only supported path.

**Data integration: New sources and improved compatibility.** Major data integration enhancements including Google Business Profile source, Salesforce Marketing Cloud data extensions, and improved Microsoft & Google Ads sources.
**User, admin, and audit experience upgrades.** Workspace landing page preference, Secret manager page, Trace Audit logs for admins, and improved onboarding/user navigation.
releases.summary: For full details, see release documentation and in-app Home ➔ What's New feed. Thank you for using Mage Pro!
releases.title: Mage Pro Release Notes

highlights: Publish release notes as markdown without changing the frontend.
Show new releases automatically from the public manifest.
Verify the changelog experience with live browser screenshots.
releases.summary: A visual QA release that proves the Mage Pro changelog page updates from public markdown content instead of frontend code changes.
releases.title: Release Feed Smoke Test

highlights: Launch isolated cloud agent dev slots from a shared EKS cluster.
Review Mage Pro changes through a public changelog feed.
Connect frontend QA directly to linked Mage Pro environments.
releases.summary: A release focused on making agent-driven development, shared QA, and product release communication feel connected from commit to customer-facing changelog.
releases.title: Agent Command Center

highlights: Spot late-running pipelines before SLAs are missed.
Compare block output changes across recent runs.
Send clearer status summaries to operators and stakeholders.
releases.summary: A more confident control room for teams that need to know what changed, what is late, and what needs attention.
releases.title: Observability Upgrades

highlights: Keep permission reviews fast with clearer role summaries.
Load large project dashboards with fewer blocking requests.
releases.summary: A foundation release that makes workspace setup, governance, and everyday navigation feel faster and more predictable.
releases.title: Workspace Foundations
